zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye於1535年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可姆斯比。她與Robert Taylor在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1603年在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特享年68歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye于1535年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可姆斯比。她与Robert Taylor在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1603年在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特享年68岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye was born in 1535, in Hemsby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Robert Taylor in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1603, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye est née en 1535, à Hemsby, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Robert Taylor à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1603, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye wurde 1535 in Hemsby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat in England Robert Taylor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1603 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England und wurde in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye è nata il nel 1535 nel Hemsby, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Robert Taylor nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1603, nel Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Grayeは1535年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヘムスビーで生まれた。イギリスでRobert Taylorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1603年にイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで68歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー スト ミチャエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye(은)는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 헤스비에서 태어났다. 그녀는 영국에서 Robert Taylor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1603년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye nasceu em 1535, em Hemsby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Robert Taylor em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1603, em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye родилась в 1535 г. в местности хемсби, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Taylor в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1603 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Graye nació en 1535, en Hemsby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Robert Taylor en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1603, en Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
